title: Data Ehrenfest Procedure
author: Abiam Tamburrini
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This data file corresponds to one of the 60 simulations run and is composed of the averages of the quantities compared in the associated research work. In the file's header, you can verify what quantity each column corresponds to.
